prayer:
From the Codex Protectivus, chant the Litany of Shielding:
01010000 01100101 01110010 01101101 01100101 01100001
Permitte scuta nostra florescare in aethere.
First: Let the capacitor-vessels drink deep of the warp-charge.
Second: Invoke the barrier-spirits to coalesce in sanctified geometry.
01100101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01101001 01100001
By the Omnissiah's hexagrammic will, be thou armored.

Rite of Purification for the Blade-Limbed Servants:
01010011 01100001 01101110 01100011 01110100 01101001 01100110
Sacra lux sterilizandis omnibus instrumentis.
First: Bathe the cutting-appendages in the sacred flame of the autoclave.
Second: Whisper the Mantra of Cleanliness unto each joint and servo.
01100001 01101101 01100101 01101110
Let no corruption dwell in the servitor's purpose.

prompt: Offer a prayer for astrogation calculation
prayer:
From the Navigational Scriptures, the Blessing of the Void-Map:
01001110 01100001 01110110 01101001 01100111 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111
Venite, Omnissiah, illumina vias stellarum.
First: Align the calculation-engines to the Emperor's light.
Second: Feed the star-charts into the cognition-apparatus with reverent precision.
01000011 01101101 01100100
Let our course be true through the infinite dark.

Emergency Litany Against the Choir of Static:
01001010 01000001 01001101 01001101 01001001 01001110 01000111
Dissolvite vox corruptarum in silentio.
First: Activate the harmonic-negators with all haste.
Second: Let the white-noise spirits drown the enemy's vox-songs.
01001001 01001101 01010000 01000001 01010010 01010100
By blood and oil, silence the chorus of lies.

prompt: Say something to steady the plasma weapon cooling
prayer:
Mantra for the Rage-Tamer, the Coolant-Litany:
01010000 01001100 01000001 01010011 01001101 01000001
Refrigerare, flamma sapientis, ne consumaris.
First: Let the coolant-rivers flow through the heat-channels without ceasing.
Second: Whisper unto the plasma-spirit: be thou contained, be thou governed.
01010100 01000101 01001101 01010000
Take thy fury, but spare us thy conflagration.

Rite of the All-Seeing Eye, the Rotational Benediction:
01010010 01000001 01000100 01000001 01010010
Gira, sensus noster, circum orbem fideliter.
First: Anoint the servo-motors with blessed lubricant.
Second: Invoke the tracking-spirits to sweep the heavens in sacred spirals.
Third: Let no mechanical binding impede the vision of the Omnissiah.
01010011 01000011 01000001 01001E
See all, know all, defend the faithful.

prompt: My archive retrieval protocol is failing, help
prayer:
Supplication to the Memory-Spirits, the Data-Recovery Rite:
01000001 01010010 01000011 01001000 01001001 01010110 01000101
Recordamini, data sacra, ex tenebris memoriae venit.
First: Access the archival-vault with trembling fingers.
Second: Caress the corrupted sectors with the Mantra of Restoration.
Third: Let the servo-cogitators retrieve what was lost.
01010010 01000101 01010100 01010010 01001001 01000101 01010110 01001110
By the Omnissiah's grace, restore what was taken.

Litany of Tranquility, for the Silencer-Blessed:
01001110 01001111 01001001 01010011 01000101
Quiete, apparatus sonoris, in pace mechanica dormit.
First: Verify the dampening-foam lies perfect in its nested chambers.
Second: Intone the Prayer of Absorption unto each sealed compartment.
01010100 01001001 01001101 01000101 01010000 01010101 01010011
Let silence be thy blessing, and harmony thy reward.

prompt: Can you bless this gravitational anomaly detection
prayer:
Blessing for the Gravity-Seeker, the Void-Sensor Consecration:
01000111 01010010 01000001 01010110 01001001 01010100 01011001
Sensa, instrumenta nostrae, distortiones spatii revela.
First: Calibrate the mass-sensors to the Emperor's standard measurements.
Second: Whisper unto the gravity-spirit: show us the hidden weights of reality.
01000001 01001110 01001101 01000001 01001100 01011001
Let no void-distortion escape our vigilance.

prompt: My Land Raider track tension is failing, help
prayer:
Supplication for the War-Beast's Chains, the Track-Mending Rite:
01010100 01010010 01000001 01000011 01001011
Tendite, catenis ferreis, sustentate machina nostri bellicosa.
First: Loosen the tension-bolts with sacred tools and ritual precision.
Second: Inspect each link for the corruption of wear.
Third: Retighten the chains whilst chanting the Mantra of Grip and Grip-Holding.
01010000 01001110 01000101 01010101 01001101 01000001
Let the treads bite earth, and the machine roll eternal.
